title: Workflows Item Creation with Date Transfer
excerpt: We are tracking conferences our team attends on one board with dates of the conferences. I would like to have an automation that once the status is changed from “Planned” to “Scheduled,” a new item is created in our soci…

posts.author: bbain (Bree Bain)
posts.cookedHtml: We are tracking conferences our team attends on one board with dates of the conferences. I would like to have an automation that once the status is changed from “Planned” to “Scheduled,” a new item is created in our social media planner. However, I cannot figure out how to get the item to select the start date from the conference board; therefore, it would be irrelevant because the date would be all wrong. Does anyone know a workaround for this to get dates to transfer with new items created?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @bbain - you can map the columns in the item creation automation from source to destination (timeline, date, etc).

Can you offer some additional information as maybe I am missing something?
Mark
